name: Meringue Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites with salt and cream of tarter until stiff peaks form.
2. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat on high speed until the mixture is thick and glossy.
3. Gently fold in vanilla extract.
4. Stir in chocolate chips until just combined.
5. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or lightly grease an air-space cookie sheet.
6. Using a spoon, drop rounded teaspoonfuls of batter onto the prepared baking sheet.
7. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 25 minutes, or until the cookies are set and only lightly browned.
8. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
This recipe can be doubled by using additional egg whites, but do not increase the amount of chocolate chips. For best results, consume within a few days.
